name: While Loop Non-Termination
description: While loop whose body does not modify any variable referenced in the loop condition. If the condition is true on entry, it stays true forever.
smt2Template:
(declare-const condition_before Int)
(declare-const condition_after Int)
(assert (= condition_before 1))
(assert (= condition_after condition_before))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: sensor polling loop checks flag but loop body never updates it
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const flag Int)
(declare-const flag_after Int)
(assert (= flag 1))
(assert (= flag_after flag))
(check-sat)
